must_detect.matched_text: Issuer‑relative materiality is assessed by the CFO and Compliance (e.g., a staffing change in a small branch may be immaterial, but a head‑office consolidation or debt covenant breach may be material given our scale and leverage).

Meridian Isles Holdings, Inc. — Data Retention and MNPI Handling Workflow (PH), v1.3; Unit 804 Aurora Centrum, 85 Ilang‑Ilang St., Brgy. San Liway, Luzdel City 1409.
This workflow covers HR, tax, payroll banking, and capital‑markets records; processing by BayanLink Payments OPC (payroll) and CloudVista APAC Pte. (hosting) is under our DPA and cross‑border safeguards.
Personal data means information by which a person is identified or can be directly ascertained with other data under the Data Privacy Act; sensitive personal data (e.g., health data) receives enhanced controls.
Data Privacy Officer: Atty. Lira M. Santos; DSAR/queries via dpo@meridianisles.ph or +63 2 591 8899; we acknowledge within 5 days and substantively respond within 30 days, subject to lawful exceptions.
HR collects employee names, residential addresses, employee numbers, tax identifiers, and payroll bank details solely for employment, payroll, and statutory compliance; finance keeps officer and director registers for regulatory reporting.
Retention: HR files 10 years from separation; payroll and tax support 10 years from filing; insider lists, director/officer registers, and trading blackout records 7 years from last update; capital‑markets working papers 7 years unless a regulator requires longer.
MNPI includes non‑public financials, board approvals, capital‑raising plans, and unannounced restructurings as defined under the SRC (e.g., Sec. 27 on insider trading); no selective disclosure to analysts, lenders, or vendors is permitted.
Public disclosure of material events is made promptly via the Exchange’s EDGE portal in accordance with SRC Rule 17 (e.g., current reports on Form 17‑C); insiders observe blackout windows from two weeks before Form 17‑Q/17‑A filing until two trading days after posting.
As disclosed on EDGE in Form 17‑C dated 15 Aug 2025 regarding the lease of the Nueva Romera Annex, that item is already public and is not treated as MNPI here; this note does not alter the public status of any such filing.
Issuer‑relative materiality is assessed by the CFO and Compliance (e.g., a staffing change in a small branch may be immaterial, but a head‑office consolidation or debt covenant breach may be material given our scale and leverage).
Transfers: limited PII may be sent to CloudVista APAC Pte. (Singapore) under standard contractual clauses and local privacy regulator guidelines; MNPI may not be transferred to processors unless strictly necessary and ring‑fenced by access controls.
Security controls: role‑based access, encryption at rest/in transit, and redaction for external auditors; any dataset containing MNPI is tagged “EDGE‑Pending” and added to the Insider List maintained by Compliance.
Benign note: our 12 Jan 2024 website press release on a community outreach program and an industry memo from Isla Bank Cooperative about ATM fee schedules are general communications and do not trigger MNPI handling, retention, or blackout rules.
Escalation: suspected data breaches or inadvertent MNPI disclosures must be reported within 24 hours to dpo@meridianisles.ph and compliance@meridianisles.ph; where required, we notify the privacy
